description_long: This is a modern desk lamp with a matte black conical shade and a slender, straight stem. The lamp features a circular base with a small, round, gold-colored button or knob, and a matching gold accent at the joint where the shade meets the stem. The interior of the shade is a warm gold color, likely to enhance light reflection and provide a cozy glow. The lamp has a minimalist design with clean lines and a functional aesthetic, suitable for contemporary urban environments. A visible power cord extends from the base, indicating it is electrically powered.
description: A sleek, black desk lamp with a conical shade, gold accents, and a circular base, featuring a minimalist modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the conical black shade, gold joint, and circular base with a gold button.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the shade and the straight stem, with the gold joint visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the shade, gold joint, and base from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view looking directly into the gold interior of the conical shade, with the base and button visible below.
